title: Auto Mine Forward
description: A simple mod for mining forward automatically (default toggle key M), useful for skyblock.
body:
This is a simple mod for mining forward automatically (default toggle key M), useful for skyblock.

It works just like ClickLock or disconnect mouse trick except it works even when inventoy is open or the game is paused on multiplayer allowing you to use your pc while AFK mining in your skyblock world.

If you plan on using it on skyblock servers check if the rules allow it first.
